rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ISERINO VS. C-TWO GROUP, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 17, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT C-TWO GROUP, INC., and, C&L ASSOCIATES INC., DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. As to the second cause of action for conversion, plaintiff must allege what property defendant converted. As to the third cause of action for negligent interference, plaintiff must allege interference beyond the breach of contract and specify actual third party relationships. As to the fourth cause of action for negligent misrepresentation, plaintiff must specify the misrepresentation with particularity. =(302/CWW)
